The fetch request timed out, so I'll try a different approach—either using curl or adjusting the fetch parameters. First, let me check the knowledge base README to see how it's organized.

The URL structure looks suspicious—that 19-digit ID is way longer than typical Zhihu article IDs, which are usually 9-10 digits. I should try a different fetching approach or clarify the URL with the user.
